likely_causes.why: Incident with failure code F102 (similar machine type) had root cause of spindle lubrication system failure, which can lead to vibration and bearing noise.
Incident with failure code F121 (similar machine type) had root cause of wear detected in drive bearings, which can produce abnormal noise and vibration.

recommended_checks: inspect spindle lubrication system for leaks or blockages
check bearing condition and lubrication levels

manual_references.source_pdf: Century NEMA 42-140 Frame Motor Instruction Leaflet.pdf
manual_references.reason: Manual warns about improper lubrication and its potential to cause motor damage, relevant to observed symptoms.

similar_incidents.summary: Spindle lubrication system failure caused vibration and required maintenance action.
Coolant flow disruption detected in spindle, resolved with maintenance action.

clarifying_questions: Has the lubrication system been inspected recently?
Are there any recent changes to coolant or lubricant specifications?
evidence_gaps: Missing direct correlation between fault code E102 and specific incident root causes
Limited manual guidance specific to fault code E102
